x : K
⊢ (valuation K) x = 1 ↔ ∃ r, x = ↑↑r

    have hx : v x ≤ 1 := h.le
    have hx' : v x⁻¹ ≤ 1 := by rw [map_inv₀, h, inv_one]; exact le_refl _
    rw [← Valuation.mem_integer_iff] at hx hx'
    refine ⟨⟨⟨⟨x, hx⟩, ⟨x⁻¹, hx'⟩, ?_, ?_⟩, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
    all_goals { ext; simp; apply mul_inv_cancel₀; rintro rfl; simp [map_zero v] at h }
  · rintro ⟨r, rfl⟩
    rw [← Valuation.isUnit_iff_val_eq_one]
    exact r.isUnit
